title: Unpublish / take down the application

requirements.text: Unpublish the application so it is no longer publicly accessible. Replace the live site with a simple, branded 'Coming Soon' or offline placeholder page that displays the Luminia Group name and indicates the site is temporarily unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: The main application content (hero, navigation, manifesto, subsidiaries, footer, welcome popup) is no longer rendered to visitors.
A placeholder page is shown in its place with the Luminia Group branding.
The placeholder page is styled consistently with the existing luxury dark design system (obsidian background, gold accents, Cormorant Garamond typography).
No broken layouts or console errors appear on the placeholder page.

constraints: Do not delete or destructively remove existing components — preserve them so the site can be re-published later.
Maintain the existing design tokens and Tailwind configuration.
nonGoals: Changing any authentication or Internet Identity logic.
Permanently deleting any existing frontend components or assets.
